task_objective: Restrict report template selection to a safe allowlist and prevent path traversal.
design_decisions: Added validation logic to fall back to 'default' if an invalid theme is requested.
Recorded a warning in the report's analysis data when an invalid theme is used.
Added an extra layer of defense using os.path.realpath and os.path.commonpath to ensure the template stays within the templates directory.
results: Successfully secured ProfileReport.to_html against theme-based path traversal. Verified with new security tests and confirmed no regressions in the full test suite.
